must_detect.matched_text:
Indicative Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition by Citrine Banyan Holdings Limited (Main Board issuer; stock code 00XX0) of a controlling interest in OrchidByte Systems Holdings Limited from Lumen Peak Ventures SPC — Cell A
Transaction: Non-binding proposal for a share purchase conferring control over OrchidByte Systems Holdings Limited; subject to negotiation of definitive agreements and completion of confirmatory due diligence
Purpose: Strategic expansion into logistics software and cloud operations, consistent with the issuer’s public strategy update published on hkexnews.hk on 28 Feb 20X3
Structure and Consideration: Mix of cash and new shares in Citrine Banyan Holdings Limited to be determined by independent valuation; no fixed price or exchange ratio is specified in this term sheet
Funding: Purchaser expects to utilise an undrawn facility previously described in its 20X2 annual report and a potential cornerstone commitment from Verdant Tern Capital Fund I, L.P. (non-binding indication of interest)
Regulatory Classification: Preliminary size tests based on last audited public financials indicate a discloseable or major transaction under Chapter 14 of the Listing Rules; no connected transaction is anticipated at this stage
Conditions Precedent: satisfactory due diligence, board approvals, any HKEX disclosure obligations, and confirmation that no whitewash waiver is required under the SFC Takeovers Code
Disclosure and Announcements: Inside information will be managed in accordance with Part XIVA of the SFO and Rule 13.09; any announcement will be published on the HKEX website and may reference prior public press releases dated 20X2–20X3
Blackout/Dealing Restrictions: The issuer’s model code blackout periods are set out in its published corporate governance report; no option grants were made during the last blackout as disclosed in the 20X3 interim report
Employees and Integration: No immediate changes to employee terms are contemplated; any adjustments will follow posted HR policies and applicable Hong Kong employment laws; no individual personnel arrangements are included herein
Timetable: A non-binding MOU was announced on 12 May 20X3; indicative signing is targeted for late Q3 20X4 with completion within 90 days thereafter, subject to third-party consents
Due Diligence Scope: business, legal, tax, and IT diligence on the Target; the Vendor will provide a data room index substantially similar to that used in its publicly described 20X3 divestment process
Closing Mechanics: completion accounts or locked-box approach to be agreed; warranties and indemnities on customary terms for Hong Kong transactions; no earn-out terms are committed in this term sheet
Proposed announcement timing: The issuer intends to publish a Part XIVA/Rule 13.09 announcement regarding this proposed acquisition on or about 15 August 20X4; as at the date hereof, this intended timing has not been disclosed publicly
